sections.title: Getting Around LA
sections.summary: Los Angeles is car-dependent and spread out, so your transport plan shapes your whole trip. A mix of rental car, rideshare, and the Metro on a few key corridors works best for solo travelers.
bullets: Rental car: the most freedom for exploring beyond the core ($40–$80/day).
Uber & Lyft: reliable and safe citywide — ideal at night or without a car.
Metro E Line: connects DTLA to Santa Monica; B Line reaches Hollywood.
Walking: great within Santa Monica, Silver Lake, and Los Feliz — not between them.
